title: Is Texas Pacific Land (TPL) Stock Outpacing Its Oils-Energy Peers This Year?
text: Here is how Texas Pacific (TPL) and YPF Sociedad Anonima (YPF) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: The Top (and Bottom) Five Stocks of 2022
text: Occidental Petroleum, Constellation Energy, Antero Resources, Texas Pacific Land, and Signify Health are the top stocks of the year. The bottom five are Affirm Holdings, AppLovin, Wayfair, Coinbase Global, and Twilio.

title: Top 5 Momentum Stocks for December After a Solid November
text: We have narrowed our search to five momentum stocks that have solid upside left for December. These are: ANET, FTNT, DINO, DCP and TPL.
